_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Advocate organization's official position in legal and legislative proceedings.
reference_document_element_description: Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for regulatory, audit, or executive decision support contexts.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.400), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.394).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 0.9/10 (raw 0.091). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [advocate, legal, legislative, official, organization, position] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.874, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (88.1%). "Advocate organization's official position in legal and legislative proceedings." and "Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.405 > STS 0.091 (gap +0.314). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [advocate, legal, legislative, official, organization, position]. WIDAI terms: [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, evidence].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.314 with low STS 0.091. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
